product.name: Lotus & Windoware Cordless, 2 Inch Faux Wood Blind, 34.5" Wide x 60" Long, Window Blinds, Blinds & Shades, Blinds for Indoor Windows, Embossed, Bright White
features: IMPORTANT! – This window blind measures exactly 34" wide and is designed to fit inside a 34.5" wide window, following industry-standard sizing. A 1/2-inch deduction is applied to ensure proper bracket placement within the window frame for a secure fit.

Measuring Guide: For width, measure your window horizontally at the top, middle, and bottom, recording the narrowest measurement. Choose the closest size, which will come with a 1/2-inch deduction for a proper fit. This blinds for indoor windows actual size is 34 inches to fit within a 34.5 inch window frame. For the length, measure the longest vertical distance from top to bottom. The blind can exceed your recorded measurement as the cordless feature allows the blind to stop at any position within the frame. Suit

Designed for Your Living Space: Our 2-inch Faux Wood Blinds are designed to accommodate various window sizes and styles. Dimensions are listed in WIDTH x HEIGHT format. For the best fit, please refer to our measuring guide before purchasing.

Effortless Control with Cordless Design: The cordless design is safe for homes with children and pets. Operate the window shade effortlessly with a simple touch. Adjusting the slat position is easy with the cordless wand tilt control. Simply turn the wand for privacy, room darkening, and light control.

Easy to Install & User Friendly: Faux Wood Blinds offer style and privacy, ideal for different room types such as living rooms, bedrooms, dens, and kitchens. They come complete with hardware and installation instructions for both inside and outside mounting. Each blind includes a 3 1/4" crown valance to provide the appearance of real wood blinds.

INCLUDES HARDWARE & INSTRUCTIONS: Faux Wood Blinds are a great way to add style and privacy to your home. These blinds are perfect for a number of room types, from living rooms to bedrooms, dens and kitchens. Your blind will include instructions, hardware for both inside or outside mounting and includes a 3 1/4" crown valance that gives the look of real wood blinds.
